summary: Leptin acts as a pro-inflammatory adipokine associated with systemic inflammation in obesity but has no established link to phagocytic NADPH oxidase overactivity based on current literature. The mechanism connecting leptin directly to increased reactive oxygen species production via this pathway lacks empirical support.
